prompt_text: A comedic safari scene at dawn on the African savanna. A lioness sits beside a male lion with a thick dark mane. In the background, another lioness walks near a lone acacia tree. The lighting is golden and warm, casting long shadows across the dry grass under a clear sky. Text overlays include 'busted' with an arrow pointing to the background lioness.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A comedic safari scene at dawn on the African savanna. A lioness sits beside a male lion with a thick dark mane. In the background, another lioness walks near a lone acacia tree. The lighting is golden and warm, casting long shadows across the dry grass under a clear sky. Text overlays include 'busted' with an arrow pointing to the background lioness.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium shot, eye-level, slightly panning left. The focus remains sharp on the foreground pair.

actions: The lioness nudges the male lion's face with her snout.
The male lion looks toward the camera with a startled, wide-eyed expression.
The lioness strikes the male lion on the head with her paw.
The male lion cringes and lowers his head as if being scolded.
The lioness continues to stare off-camera sternly while the male rests his head on the ground.
dialogue: [Sound of a slap or 'thwack' sound effect when the lioness hits the lion]
